title: Charter Rate and Refund Policy
body:
Charter Rate and Refund Policy (2027 season)

Current rate sheet for F/V Bay Runner charters, effective for the 2027 season. Supersedes all prior rate sheets.

  • Full day charter (up to 6 anglers): 1450 USD
  • Half day charter (up to 6 anglers): 850 USD
  • Deposit to hold a date: 25 percent of the trip rate, due at booking
  • Cancellation inside 14 days forfeits the deposit unless the date is re-sold
  • Agent commission is 15 percent of the trip rate, netted at settlement
